name: synth
description: A synthesizer where each card generates unique audio parameters from its seed hash. Power = volume, toughness = bass, rarity = reverb, category = waveform. Your deck is a chord.

model.usage: No AI needed. Pure deterministic sound from card seeds. Every card = unique tone. Works fully offline.

system: Synthesizer cartridge. Derives audio parameters from card seed hashes. Plays tones via the Web Audio API in the browser context.

metadata.inspiration: Korg MS-20, Novation Circuit, chiptune synthesis
metadata.tagline: Every card has a voice. Play your deck.
